chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 210 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 31-03-2022 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Counsel, has filed vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No.4 to 7. He further submits that this Petition can be disposed of in similar terms as per order dated 07-09-2021 passed in C. P. No. D-1232 of 2021. Apparently, the Petitioner has filed some application seeking early retirement on completion of required service, which has not been decided by the concerned Department. In view of the above, this Petition is disposed of with direction to Respondents No.4 & 5 to decide the request of the Petitioner preferably within thirty days from today in accordance of the prevailing law and circular of the Finance Department dated 15-03-1990. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
